name: Imperial Royal Weddings
description: Exchange your vows against the backdrop of shimmering lakes and ancient sandstone pavilions. Our dedicated wedding curators craft bespoke royal celebrations, complete with elephant arrivals, custom floral installations, fine-dining banquets, and world-class heritage entertainment.

name: Executive Boardroom Retreats
description: Inspire your board of directors in a setting of unmatched focus and poise. Our private palace meeting salons feature advanced high-speed modern communications integrated within classical stone interiors, complete with private dining rooms and post-meeting wellness programs.
